proposition: Radek Juhaňák and Jakub Kaman are both shareholders of Able.cz s.r.o. and co-own one label s.r.o. (IČO 02474727, Znojmo) together with Ondřej Kaman. Per the primary register: Jakub Kaman 36 % (jednatel since 2 Jan 2014; sole founder, 100 % until 2017), Ondřej Kaman 34 % (jednatel since 23 Feb 2022; 49 % during 2017–2022), Radek Juhaňák 30 % (jednatel since 23 Feb 2022).
shortTitle: Radek Juhaňák and Jakub Kaman are both shareholders of Able.cz…
statusExplanation: Přímo doloženo primárním/oficiálním zdrojem (např. přímý výpis rejstříku nebo zakládaná listina).
note: The stake split was disputed between two mirror passes (CON-02) — resolved 2026-07-18 from the preserved ARES VR record for IČO 02474727.

sources.title: ARES — official REST API, basic + full public-register (VR) records for all 19 in-scope entities, preserved and hashed
